SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-11-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT PENDING. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNICKEL, WILLIAM J. HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WILLIAM J. BARNICKEL IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-23-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON SETTLEMENT. (PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HE DID NOT APPEAR FOR PROGRESS REPORT DATE BECAUSE HIS COPY OF MEDIATION AGREEMENT DID NOT HAVE A CONTINUE DATE WRITTEN ON IT.
